generated_oml:

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts crane parameters in real-time",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

    base:desc "Access to historical operational metrics for analysis"
]

    base:desc "Interactive monitoring of current system states"
]

]

]

    base:desc "Predictive analysis of future crane operations"
]

    base:desc "Tracking of code repository versions"
]

    base:desc "Containerized deployment of digital twin components"
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adjusts crane parameters in real-time for optimal operation",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Persistent storage of operational metrics for historical analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive monitoring of system states through runtime visualization",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateVisualizationInsight
]

    base:desc "Dynamically assesses accuracy of digital model against physical crane",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAccuracyValidationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes optimal movement paths for crane operations",
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryGenerationInsight
]

    base:desc "Performs predictive analysis of crane operations",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationPredictionInsight
]

instance CodeVersioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages version control of digital twin code repositories",
    DTDFVocab:provides CodeVersioningInsight
]

instance ContainerDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Deploys digital twin components using containerization",
    DTDFVocab:provides ContainerDeploymentInsight
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for persistent data storage",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides runtime visualization capabilities for system monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

    base:desc "Computes optimal movement paths using kinematic model",

]

    base:desc "Leverages kinematic model for predictive analysis",
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Compares real-time operational values against thresholds for validation",

]

instance GitHubEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub-hosted code repositories for version control",
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeVersioningService
]

instance ContainerizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization technologies for code dissemination",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContainerDeploymentService
]

]

    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane cyber-physical system for reproducible digital twin research",

]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control Application executes trajectory commands generated by Trajectory Generator Service via Physical Crane Interface to control the physical crane. Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectories against simulations, triggering operator alerts if discrepancies exceed thresholds."

    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service compares real-time measurements of executed trajectories against simulated trajectories, calculating distance metrics (e.g., Euclidean) and comparing deviations against predefined thresholds to ensure model fidelity and data accuracy."
]

    base:desc "MQTT protocol facilitates communication between services via MQTT Broker; TimescaleDB and Grafana handle data storage and visualization. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed on-premise on a personal computer, with the Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard services containerized using Docker. ]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar uses AutomationML for digital twin modeling and Microsoft Azure tools.
